steps.title: Mark the strong boundary
steps.content: The words is well documented form a complete independent clause. What follows is a related elaboration about how the organisms share nutrients and form a community, so the sentence needs strong punctuation between the parts.

steps.title: Test the punctuation
steps.content: Choice A gives no boundary. Choice B uses a colon before a participial phrase, which does not fit as well. Choice C uses a semicolon to separate the complete claim from the elaboration. Choice D uses a comma too weakly between major clauses. The answer is C.
